title: Behind the Scenes | Cents of Style Collaboration
excerpt: Thanks so much for all the love and support for yesterday's launch of my Oh What Fun! collaboration with Cents of Style . I shot some video of traveling to Utah for less than 24 hours and it just went…
body: Thanks so much for all the love and support for yesterday's launch of my Oh What Fun! collaboration with Cents of Style. I shot some video of traveling to Utah for less than 24 hours and it just went up on YouTube or you can also watch it below. Did you also see that there's a big giveaway happening here?
